Preconditions: App is reachable; valid admin credentials available
Steps: Open login page; Enter valid admin email and password; Click Sign In
ExpectedOutcome: Login succeeds; Dashboard opens; current user shown in header

Steps: Open login page; Enter invalid credentials; Click Sign In
ExpectedOutcome: Error message shown; user remains on login page; no protected data loaded

Steps: Open first-user setup; Enter required details; Submit
ExpectedOutcome: First admin user created; success message shown; created user can sign in

Preconditions: On first-user setup or reset form
Steps: Enter password shorter than policy; Submit
ExpectedOutcome: Validation error shown; request is not submitted

Steps: Stay inactive beyond idle timeout
ExpectedOutcome: Session expires; user is redirected to login

Steps: Interact periodically (click/scroll/keypress)
ExpectedOutcome: Session remains active; no unexpected logout

Steps: Open Customize; change Platform Name and Primary Color; Save
ExpectedOutcome: Header/login branding updates; CTA color updates; values persist after refresh

Scenario: Update environment label and login subtitle
Steps: Open Customize; edit Environment Label and Login Subtitle; Save; Logout
ExpectedOutcome: Login page shows updated subtitle and environment label

Steps: Open Customize; enter invalid color; Save
ExpectedOutcome: System normalizes/falls back to valid color; UI does not break

Preconditions: Admin user logged in; HR CSV available
Steps: Inventory > Identity Inventory; Upload 01_hr_users_inventory.csv
ExpectedOutcome: Users grid populates; counts/rows align with input

Steps: Change one user's role via row dropdown
ExpectedOutcome: Role update succeeds; persists after refresh

Steps: Select multiple users; Click Set Role; Select role in modal; Click Apply Role
ExpectedOutcome: Modal appears only after click; selected users updated; selection cleared

Scenario: Bulk role guard with zero selection
Steps: Do not select users; inspect/click Set Role
ExpectedOutcome: Action blocked or disabled; clear guidance shown

Steps: Click Reset Password for a user; Copy temp password; Close modal
ExpectedOutcome: Temporary password displayed; copy works; modal closes

Steps: Inventory > App Configurations; Upload 02_application_onboarding_bulk.csv
ExpectedOutcome: Applications created and listed with owner mappings

Steps: Click Add Application; fill mandatory fields; Save
ExpectedOutcome: App created and visible in list; missing mandatory fields are validated

Steps: Select APP_FIN and upload 03_accounts_APP_FIN.csv; Repeat for APP_HCM and APP_CRM
ExpectedOutcome: Accounts ingested under each app; UI reflects uploaded rows

Steps: Upload each 04_entitlements_*.csv for matching app
ExpectedOutcome: Entitlement catalogs updated; privileged markers align with data; risk/riskScore not required in entitlement CSV

Steps: Inventory > Global SoD Policies; Upload 05_bulk_sod_policies.csv
ExpectedOutcome: Policies created and listed; conflicts become detectable

Steps: Click New Policy; fill both conditions and policy severity; Save
ExpectedOutcome: New policy appears in list; UI labels policy severity clearly

Preconditions: At least one SoD policy exists
Steps: Delete a policy
ExpectedOutcome: Policy removed and no stale detail links remain

Steps: Inspect expected external/orphan accounts
ExpectedOutcome: Orphan badges shown for identities not present in HR

Scenario: Launch campaign for app with accounts
Preconditions: At least one app has accounts
Steps: Dashboard > Launch Campaign; pick app with accounts; set due date; launch
ExpectedOutcome: Campaign launched and visible in active campaigns

Scenario: Block launch for app without accounts
Preconditions: At least one app has zero accounts
Steps: Dashboard > Launch Campaign; pick zero-account app; launch
ExpectedOutcome: Launch blocked with No accounts found message

Steps: Launch modal; select second/third app; launch
ExpectedOutcome: Launch succeeds for any valid app; no false no-account error

Steps: Attempt launch again for same app
ExpectedOutcome: Blocked with already-running message

Scenario: Campaign detail filters (including dual risk filters)
Preconditions: At least one campaign with mixed items exists
Steps: Open campaign detail; apply User/Entitlement/Decision/Remediation filters; apply Risk (Critical/High/Medium/Low) and Risk Factor (Privileged/SoD/Orphan/None)
ExpectedOutcome: Grid updates correctly; filters combine correctly; empty state shown when no matches

Preconditions: At least one campaign with mixed risk items exists
Steps: Open campaign detail and inspect table columns
ExpectedOutcome: Entitlement and Risk Factors are separate columns; row shows LOW RISK when no risk factors

Steps: Open campaign detail; click Export Campaign
ExpectedOutcome: CSV downloads with expected columns and records

Steps: Open pending item; Approve
ExpectedOutcome: Item status updates to APPROVED; action audit logged

Steps: Open pending item; Revoke
ExpectedOutcome: Item status updates to REVOKED; enters remediation tracking

Steps: Use Reassign action; choose different reviewer; submit
ExpectedOutcome: Manager changes; reassignment metadata updates; notification attempted if configured

Steps: Select eligible items; open bulk reassign; choose reviewer; submit
ExpectedOutcome: Eligible items reassigned; ineligible/limit cases handled cleanly

Preconditions: Campaign has revoked items pending verification
Steps: Manager clicks Confirm
ExpectedOutcome: Campaign does not move to COMPLETED prematurely

Scenario: Dual risk filters in My Reviews
Steps: Apply Risk (Critical/High/Medium/Low) and Risk Factor (Privileged/SoD/Orphan/None) filters
ExpectedOutcome: Both filters apply together; None returns items without risk factors

Steps: Remove entitlement from source accounts; re-import account data
ExpectedOutcome: Item transitions to remediated/verified state; pending remediation decreases

Steps: Re-import account data where revoked entitlement still exists
ExpectedOutcome: Item remains pending remediation/verification; campaign remains non-complete

Steps: Launch campaign with multiple reviewers
ExpectedOutcome: Assignments trigger notification workflow without UI crash

Steps: Open campaign detail; click Send Reminder
ExpectedOutcome: Completion summary shown with sent/skipped counts

Steps: Open campaign detail; click Escalate Pending
ExpectedOutcome: Escalation summary shown; pending owners targeted

Steps: Open governance/audit view
ExpectedOutcome: Actions visible with actor, timestamp, and details

Steps: Apply user/action/date filters
ExpectedOutcome: Filtered result set matches criteria

Steps: Login as USER; open My Access
ExpectedOutcome: Only own access shown; admin controls unavailable

Steps: Upload malformed CSV into HR/Accounts/Entitlements
ExpectedOutcome: Validation error shown; no partial destructive update

Steps: Trigger related UI action
ExpectedOutcome: User-friendly error shown; page remains usable

Steps: Try admin-only actions (launch, role set, app config)
ExpectedOutcome: Actions hidden or blocked; no unauthorized success

Steps: Run smoke suite in both browsers
ExpectedOutcome: No blocking differences in key flows

Steps: Validate core pages at 1366x768 and 1920x1080
ExpectedOutcome: No clipped critical controls; modals fully usable
